title: Geepas 600W Hand Blender | Handheld Immersion Blender, Food Collection Stick Blender with Stainless Steel Blades for Making Baby Food Soup Sauce Puree | 12 Blending Speed & Turbo, Silver
features: ✅ CREATE IDEAL CONSISTENCY - This hand blender comes with perfect 600W power which fits you’re blending requirements. Great for blending dairy products, fruits, vegetables, sauces, soups, shakes, baby food and more.

✅ DETACHABLE STICK, EASY CLEANING - The stick is made of sturdy food grade, high strength ABS plastic material with durable 100% copper motor with Low noise DC motor and can be removed easily. Removable parts can be cleaned easily and convenient for minimal storage space.

✅ INJECTION SHELL, BLEND IT ALL - Ergonomic grip for easy blending and anti-splash guard for those messy meals! One speed turbo for blending smoothies, health drinks, dips, sauces and desserts in less time and for the whole family to enjoy.

✅ ANTI SPLASH STAINLESS STEEL BLADES - High-quality stainless steel blades of this handheld/stick blender allow for easy, efficient blending and reduce suction. Start blending the easy way - simply with one touch! Whether you mix, or create deliciously healthy smoothies and shakes, blend hearty soups, puree baby foods and so much more the blade processes your ingredients thoroughly.

✅ 12 SPEEDS & TURBO - 600W hand blender motor with 12-speed turbo control, with the turbo button you have the maximum power immediately available. Speed up food preparation and give you a unique cooking experience.
description: Product Description BLEND LIKE A PRO Great for blending dairy products, fruits, vegetables, sauces, soups, shakes, baby food and more. MULTIPLE SPEED SETTINGS Twelve variable speed options across two settings. STRONG STAINLESS STEEL BLADES High-quality stainless steel blades of this handheld/stick blender allow for easy, efficient blending and reduce suction. EASY CLEAN Removable parts can be cleaned easily and convenient for minimal storage space. DETACHABLE SHAFT Durable 100% copper motor with Low noise DC motor and can be removed easily.
